prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how the Rust borrow checker analyzes MIR (Mid-level IR) in rust-lang/rust. Find Rust source files implementing: the MIR borrow check entry point, the place conflict detection, the live range calculation, and the two-phase borrow resolution.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the rust-systems fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Trace how the Rust borrow checker analyzes MIR (Mid-level IR) in rust-lang/rust. Find Rust source files implementing: the MIR borrow check entry point, the place conflict detection, the live range calculation, and the two-phase borrow resolution.
